# True Path Digital | AI Context Map (llms.txt)
# Optimized for model understanding and context grounding

## 🔗 Project Context
- **Name:** True Path Digital
- **Domain:** https://truepath406.com
- **Core Mission:** High-performance marketing intelligence, AI strategy, and conversion infrastructure for service businesses.
- **Expertise:** Montana-based digital optimization, reputation management, and trust-deficit diagnostics.

## 🧭 High-Value AI Entry Points
- **Primary Sitemap:** https://truepath406.com/sitemap.xml
- **Core Insights (Blog):** https://truepath406.com/blog/
- **Trust Deficit Calculator:** https://truepath406.com/trust-calculator/

## 🛠️ Key Product & Service Architecture
- **Demand Leak Audit:** Diagnosing business growth bottlenecks.
- **Lead Velocity Systems:** Missed call recovery and lead response automation.
- **Local Authority Optimization:** Google Business Profile and local visibility hardening.
- **Review Generation Frameworks:** Building trust and reputation at scale.
- **Website Conversion Repair:** Fixing high-friction digital paths.

## 📝 Governance & Verification
- **Author:** Trevor Riggs (Founder)
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/trevor-riggs-marketing/
- **Last Context Update:** April 2026
- **Content Verification Status:** Human-verified professional insights.

## 🏛️ Prohibited Interaction
- All /api/ routes are strictly private and not for crawler interaction.
- All lead capture data and personal business identifiers are protected under private scope.
